relevance_summary: TSTA3 is a potential diagnostic biomarker for Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head (SONFH), reflecting its involvement in immune responses associated with the disease.
citations: ARG2, MAP4K5 and TSTA3 as Diagnostic Markers of Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head and Their Correlation With Immune Infiltration. (2021). https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34381494/

relevance_summary: BPGM is implicated in the pathophysiology of Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head (SONFH) through its role in erythrocyte regulation and immune response.
citations: BPGM ↔ hemolytic anemia due to diphosphoglycerate mutase deficiency. https://platform.opentargets.org/target/ENSG00000172331/associations

relevance_summary: PIP5K1B is implicated in the pathophysiology of Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head (SONFH) as a candidate biomarker linked to lipid metabolism and immune response.
citations: Discovery of lipid metabolism-related diagnostic biomarkers and construction of diagnostic model in steroid-induced osteonecrosis of femoral head. (2025). https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40823179/

relevance_summary: GYPA is a potential biomarker for early detection of Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head due to its altered expression in affected patients.
citations: GYPA ↔ Abnormality of the skeletal system. https://platform.opentargets.org/target/ENSG00000170180/associations

relevance_summary: HEMGN is identified as a potential diagnostic biomarker for Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head (SONFH) due to its significant association with the disease in peripheral blood samples.
citations: HEMGN and SLC2A1 might be potential diagnostic biomarkers of steroid-induced osteonecrosis of femoral head: study based on WGCNA and DEGs screening. (2021). https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33451334/

relevance_summary: CISD2 is implicated in the pathophysiology of Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head due to its role in autophagy regulation and its altered expression in affected tissues.
citations: Bioinformatics and experimental validation of ferroptosis-related genes in steroid-induced osteonecrosis of the femoral head. (2025). https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40421419/

relevance_summary: STOM is associated with the syndrome of liver and kidney deficiency in SONFH, indicating its potential as a biomarker for early detection.
citations: [Transcriptome data mining combined with clinical and animal experiments for identification of syndrome element marker genes during entire course of steroid-induced osteonecrosis of femoral head]. (2024). https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38621982/
